stemHtml: ATC issues the following instruction: 'F-GTPO cross runway 18, taxi holding point B2, hold short runway 26'. What is the correct readback?

options.a: F-GTPO cross runway 18, taxi holding point B2, hold short runway 26.
options.b: Cross runway 18, taxi holding point B2, hold short runway 26, F-GTPO.
options.c: Taxi holding point B2, hold short runway 26, F-GTPO.
